title: BEM-866 verify current codex step
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if p.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'codex_exists': p.exists(),
    'has_script_step_name': 'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit' in text,
    'has_script_call': 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in text,
    'has_queue_heartbeat': 'BEM-866 queue step heartbeat' in text,
    'has_github_script_queue': 'Process workflow dispatch queue via github-script' in text,
}
status = 'STEP_PRESENT' if checks['has_script_step_name'] and checks['has_script_call'] else 'STEP_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CURRENT_CODEX_STEP_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 current codex step\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('current codex step verify: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
